name: wonder-together-skill
description: Create Wonder Together parent-mediated learning packets, visual explainers, and gentle scripts from children's questions.

interface.shortDescription: Create parent-led learning packets from children's questions.
interface.longDescription: Wonder Together packages a creator-facing skill for turning a child's question into a warm parent-mediated packet with story, explanation, visuals, activities, parent notes, and follow-up questions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $wonder-together to turn a child's question into a parent-led learning packet.
